title: Mark
content:
Mark
No, I think you’re sick sick.

Hunter & Dan
Oooooh.

Everyone disappears from the couch besides Enrique (Road Runner).

Quick inserts of everyone spraying hands with sanitizer and madly rubbing the wetness into their hands.

Enrique
Sick sick?

Mark
Sick sick.

Enrique
What’s your proof?

Mark
You with a cough in the garden by the barbecue.

Dan
You’ve been concealing a cough?

Enrique
Oh bullshit. That was a throat clear.

Mark
So you know what I’m talking about then?

Enrique
I know exactly what you’re talking about. And it was a throat clear. And—

Hunter
I also have a confession...

Everyone’s eyes shoot to Hunter. Fully ignoring the game, they await his words.
